title: Add Claude-to-Cursor validation gate workflow
summary: Adds the Cursor gatekeeper script (tools/cursor_validation_gate.py) and the Cursor rules file (.cursor/rules/claude-task-validation.mdc) that enforce the two-worker validation workflow. These files were introduced by Cursor as part of establishing the gate contract.
why_safe: No production code changed — only tooling and Cursor rules files
tools/cursor_validation_gate.py is a local dev/CI helper; not imported by any runtime path
.cursor/rules/ is a Cursor IDE config directory; has no effect on the trading engine
No runtime/, logs/, .env, or cache files included
expected_results: targeted_tests: 18 passed (as confirmed in prior validation run)
commit_message: chore: add claude-to-cursor validation gate workflow
notes_for_cursor: Only .cursor/, tools/cursor_validation_gate.py, and docs/workflow/ should be dirty
Do not include runtime/, logs/, .env, __pycache__, or any cache files
discovery.py is at HEAD — confirmed clean, do not include in commit
